VehicleComponentParams.vehicleDescription:
Manufacturer: Tumbril Land Systems
Focus: Combat
 
Originally introduced in 2606 during the Second Tevarin War, the Tumbril Storm single-operator mini-tank was built to blitz battlefields and take out enemy artillery. Reimagined from the ground up to be faster, stronger, and more impactful than ever, the latest Storm is a true force of nature, well-suited to the frenetic landscape of modern warfare.

English.vehicleDescription:
Manufacturer: Tumbril Land Systems
Focus: Combat
 
Originally introduced in 2606 during the Second Tevarin War, the Tumbril Storm single-operator mini-tank was built to blitz battlefields and take out enemy artillery. Reimagined from the ground up to be faster, stronger, and more impactful than ever, the latest Storm is a true force of nature, well-suited to the frenetic landscape of modern warfare.

Localization.Name: Tumbril Land Systems
Localization.Description: Tumbril Land Systems got its start manufacturing ultra-rugged land vehicles built to explore the strange and dangerous landscapes of newly discovered planets. With the onset of the First Tevarin War, Tumbril expanded their operations when they won a government contract to build tanks and other military vehicles for the UPE military. Over the centuries the company eventually folded. Today, the Tumbril brand has been revived to build land vehicles from tanks to exploration vehicles and personal HOVs in both the civilian and military market.

English.Name: Tumbril Land Systems
English.Description: Tumbril Land Systems got its start manufacturing ultra-rugged land vehicles built to explore the strange and dangerous landscapes of newly discovered planets. Over the centuries the company eventually folded. Today, the Tumbril brand has been revived to build land vehicles from tanks to exploration vehicles and personal HOVs in both the civilian and military market.

Localization.Name: Self Destruct Unit
Localization.Description: Self Destruct Unit

English.Name: Self Destruct Unit
English.Description: Self Destruct Unit

Localization.Name: GNP
Localization.Description: Seeking to stand out in the crowded field of manufacturers and to compete with the more developed “homeworlds,” the governments of four outer systems banded together to subsidize the creation of GNP, an entirely new kind of company that specialized in designing everything from full-range sensor suites to ship engines.

English.Name: GNP
English.Description: Seeking to stand out in the crowded field of manufacturers and to compete with the more developed “homeworlds,” the governments of four outer systems banded together to subsidize the creation of GNP, an entirely new kind of company that specialized in designing everything from full-range sensor suites to ship engines.

Localization.Name: Prevenir
Localization.Description:
Item Type: Radar
Manufacturer: GNP
Size: 0
Grade: C
Class: Military

The Prevenir has been refined by extensive military field testing, making it the go-to vehicle radar for many across the UEE.

English.Description:
Item Type: Radar
Manufacturer: GNP
Size: 0
Grade: C
Class: Military

The Prevenir has been refined by extensive military field testing, making it the go-to vehicle radar for many across the UEE.

Localization.Name: Tumbril Land Systems
Localization.Description: Tumbril Land Systems got its start manufacturing ultra-rugged land vehicles built to explore the strange and dangerous landscapes of newly discovered planets. With the onset of the First Tevarin War, Tumbril expanded their operations when they won a government contract to build tanks and other military vehicles for the UPE military. Over the centuries the company eventually folded. Today, the Tumbril brand has been revived to build land vehicles from tanks to exploration vehicles and personal HOVs in both the civilian and military market.

Localization.Name: Lightning Power Ltd.
Localization.Description: Made out of less expensive materials, Lightning Power continues to introduce new aesthetic changes to their ship components while relying on tried and true technology to run them.

English.Name: Lightning Power Ltd.
English.Description: Made out of less expensive materials, Lightning Power continues to introduce new aesthetic changes to their ship components while relying on tried and true technology to run them.

Localization.Name: Radix
Localization.Description:
Item Type: Power Plant
Manufacturer: Lightning Power Ltd.
Size: 0
Grade: C
Class: Civilian

With more than enough get up and go to handle your vehicle’s daily energy needs, the Radix from Lightning Power Ltd. is a power plant you can count on to get you where you’re going.

English.Name: Radix
English.Description:
Item Type: Power Plant
Manufacturer: Lightning Power Ltd.
Size: 0
Grade: C
Class: Civilian

With more than enough get up and go to handle your vehicle’s daily energy needs, the Radix from Lightning Power Ltd. is a power plant you can count on to get you where you’re going.

Localization.Name: J-Span
Localization.Description: J-Span does only one thing, but does it well. For over a century they have focused on producing quality coolers at a reasonable price. Half the time these days, when you pop the hull of a spacecraft, chances are you’re going to find a J-Span. Plus, their coolers can be found in more than just ships. They have a wide variety of sizes and shapes that can be found in everything from land transports, to computer systems, to refrigerator units. Appealing to the broader consumer market, their units might not have all the bells and whistles as some of the other manufacturer’s lines, but for the most part they avoid their quirks as well.

English.Name: J-Span
English.Description: J-Span does only one thing, but does it well. For over a century they have focused on producing quality coolers at a reasonable price. Half the time these days, when you pop the hull of a spacecraft, chances are you’re going to find a J-Span. Plus, their coolers can be found in more than just ships. They have a wide variety of sizes and shapes that can be found in everything from land transports, to computer systems, to refrigerator units. Appealing to the broader consumer market, their units might not have all the bells and whistles as some of the other manufacturer’s lines, but for the most part they avoid their quirks as well.

Localization.Name: Frost-Star SL
Localization.Description:
Item Type: Cooler
Manufacturer: J-Span
Size: 0
Grade: C
Class: Civilian

Whether cruising across the ground or sailing through space, there’s a J-Span cooler perfect for you. The Frost-Star SL is a mid-tier cooler designed to bring the line’s reliability to ground and open-canopy vehicles.

English.Name: Frost-Star SL
English.Description:
Item Type: Cooler
Manufacturer: J-Span
Size: 0
Grade: C
Class: Civilian

Whether cruising across the ground or sailing through space, there’s a J-Span cooler perfect for you. The Frost-Star SL is a mid-tier cooler designed to bring the line’s reliability to ground and open-canopy vehicles.

EntityUIDisplayParams.displayDescription:
Item Type: Shield Generator
Manufacturer: Seal Corporation
Size: 0
Grade: C
Class: Civilian

With the PIN vehicle shield generator you can now trust Seal Corp to protect you whether you’re in space or atmosphere.

Localization.Name: Seal Corporation
Localization.Description: One of the earliest companies to begin selling energy based shielding to civilians when the technology was declassified, Seal Corp has been in the industry centuries longer than its current modern day competition. For a while, the term ‘seal’ was ubiquitous with shield and Sammy the Seal Corp seal is still one of the most recognizable mascots across the ’verse. While they have lost some market share to competitors over the years, they are still the most widely used brand of shields and their products can be bought easily in almost every system.

Localization.Name: Hurston Dynamics
Localization.Description: Hurston Dynamics Manufacturer placeholder info about company.

English.Name: Hurston Dynamics
English.Description: Hurston Dynamics Manufacturer placeholder info about company.

Localization.Name: Reign-3 Repeater
Localization.Description:
Manufacturer: Hurston Dynamics
Item Type: Laser Repeater
Size: 3

Hurston Dynamics has partnered with Tumbril Land Systems to craft the powerful Reign-3 laser repeater specifically for the Storm assault vehicle's turret. Utilizing Hurston Dynamics' proprietary cascade technology, the Reign-3 delivers increased performance and greater energy output as the frenetic pace of combat starts to heat up.

Localization.Name: Tumbril Storm Turret
Localization.ShortName:
Item Type: Turret
Manufacturer: Tumbril Land Systems

A bespoke turret designed for the Tumbril Storm single-operator mini-tank.
Localization.Description: Multitask on the battlefield with this remote turret system. Featuring precise controls and a wide field of fire, the turret allows pilots to add combat support to their resume.

Localization.Name: Lightning Power Ltd.
Localization.Description: Made out of less expensive materials, Lightning Power continues to introduce new aesthetic changes to their ship components while relying on tried and true technology to run them.

English.Name: Lightning Power Ltd.
English.Description: Made out of less expensive materials, Lightning Power continues to introduce new aesthetic changes to their ship components while relying on tried and true technology to run them.

Localization.Name: Fuse
Localization.Description: This safety device provides protection to relays and other power systems from excessive current. Once tripped, fuses need to be replaced before normal operation can resume.

Localization.Name: Tyler Design & Tech
Localization.Description: Tyler Design & Tech began its life manufacturing generators, air purifiers, and other necessities for planetary settlers. Tyler focused on making products that, while not as powerful as some other brands, were durable and extremely efficient with little heat byproduct which led to the development of low-signature power plants.  It wasn’t long before even the UEE Navy began to outfit some of their own stealth crafts with Tyler parts, and with their new success the company was able to expand their ship component line into what it is today.

English.Name: Tyler Design & Tech

Localization.Name: ComfortAir Lite
Localization.Description:
Item Type: Life Support
Manufacturer: Tyler Design & Tech 
Size: 0
Grade: C
Class: Civilian

Designed to be able to process atmosphere to above UEE standards, the ComfortAir life support system from Tyler Design & Tech provides you and your crew with a clean and comfortable environment.

Manufacturer: Tumbril Land Systems
Focus: Combat
 
Originally introduced in 2606 during the Second Tevarin War, the Tumbril Storm single-operator mini-tank was built to blitz battlefields and take out enemy artillery. Reimagined from the ground up to be faster, stronger, and more impactful than ever, the latest Storm is a true force of nature, well-suited to the frenetic landscape of modern warfare.
